Headline: Subway trains rerouted to elevated tracks
ShortDescription: Red Line subway trains will be rerouted to the elevated tracks between Cermak-Chinatown and Fullerton in both directions.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
Red Line subway trains will be rerouted to the elevated tracks between Cermak-Chinatown and Fullerton in both directions to allow for subway maintenance.

Trains will not stop at subway stations (see map below).

For fastest travel times, walk to the nearest ‘L’ station served by rerouted trains or use the free bus shuttle service offered between Fullerton and Clark/Lake in both directions.

Allow extra travel time.

*Entry/exit at Merchandise Mart station is via the Kinzie auxiliary entrance stairways, and requires a farecard (no vending machines), during hours when the building is closed. To make step-free transfers to Red Line trains during this time, consider shuttle buses to connect with Clark/Lake or Fullerton.

Headline: Green Line Delays
ShortDescription: Green Line trains are running w/residual delays and possible congestion following signal problems near Ashland station. Service is resuming, allow extra time.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
Green Line trains are running w/residual delays and possible congestion following signal problems near Ashland station.

Some trains and platforms may be busier than usual as crews work to restore normal service.

Trains are moving and normal service is being restored.

Allow extra travel time.

Headline: Brown Line Service Running with Delays
ShortDescription: Brown Line trains are running with significant delays due to earlier train traffic/congestion near Kimball.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
Brown Line trains are running with significant delays due to earlier train/traffic congestion near Kimball.

At this time, also consider other service alternatives that may serve your trip, such as nearby bus routes, or using buses to other rail lines.

Personnel are working to restore normal service. Allow extra travel time.

Headline: Red Line and Purple Line Express Service Running with Delays
ShortDescription: Purple and Red Line trains are running with delays after an earlier obstruction near Jarvis.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
Purple and Red Line trains are running with following an earlier obstruction near Jarvis. 

At this time consider other service alternatives that may serve your trip, such as nearby bus routes or using buses to other rail lines.

Personnel are working to restore normal service. Allow extra travel time.

Headline: #82 Kimball-Homan Temporary Reroute near Kimball/Armitage
ShortDescription: #82 Kimball-Homan SB buses are temporarily rerouted via: Kimball, Kedzie, North Ave and Homan due to street blockage near Kimball/Armitage.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
#82 Kimball-Homan Southbound buses are temporarily rerouted via: Kimball, Kedzie, North Ave and Homan due to street blockage near Kimball/Armitage.

Northbound buses are not affected.

Allow extra travel time.

Headline: #94 California Temporary Reroute near California/45th
ShortDescription: #94 California buses are temporarily rerouted in both directions due to street blockage near California/45th.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
#94 California buses are temporarily rerouted in both directions due to street blockage near California/45th

Northbound buses will operate via Western,35th and, California overt the normal route streets.

Southbound buses will operate via Pershing, Archer, Western, 51at and California over the normal route.

Allow extra travel time.

Headline: #3 King Drive buses Temporary Reroute near King Drive/87th
ShortDescription: #3 King Drive buses are temporarily rerouted in both directions, due to a street blockage near King Drive/87th.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
#3 King Drive buses are temporarily rerouted in both directions, due to a street blockage near King Drive/87th.

Northbound buses will operate via State, 87th and King Drive then resume  their normal route.

Southbound buses will operate via King Drive, 87, State and 95th then over the normal route.

Allow extra travel time.

Headline: #28 Stony Island buses Temporary Reroute near Stony Island/79th.
ShortDescription: Southbound #28 Stony Island buses are temporarily rerouted due to obstruction, continue in left lane to bypass far side service stops near Stony Island/79th.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
Southbound #28 Stony Island buses are temporarily rerouted due to obstruction, continue in left lane to bypass far side service stops near Stony Island/79th.

Northbound buses are not affected.

Allow extra travel time.

Headline: #60 Blue Island/26th Temporary Reroute at Blue Island/25th
ShortDescription: #60 Blue Island/26th buses are temporarily rerouted via 26th, California, Cermak, Western and Blue Island due to fire department activity near Blue Island/25th.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
How does this affect my trip?

#60 Blue Island/26th buses are temporarily rerouted in both directions via 26th, California, Cermak, Western and Blue Island, then resume their normal route.

Allow extra travel time.

Why is service being changed?

Buses are rerouted due to fire department activity near Blue Island/25th.

Headline: Temporary Southbound Reroute near Michigan/29th
ShortDescription: SB #1 Indiana/Hyde Park, #4 Cottage Grove & #X4 Cottage Grove Express buses rerouted via Michigan, 29th, State, 31st & Michigan due to blockage nr Michigan/29th

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
How does this affect my trip?

Southbound #1 Indiana/Hyde Park, #4 Cottage Grove and  #X4 Cottage Grove Express buses are temporarily rerouted via Michigan, 29th, State, 31st and Michigan, then resume their normal route.

Northbound buses are not affected.

Allow extra travel time.

Why is service being changed?

Buses are rerouted due to street blockage near Michigan/29th.
